_doc: Optional session manifest. `workflow up --session` (or auto-detected as .workflow/session.json) reads this and arranges your desktops/windows after the kanban server starts.
_unity_project_doc: Absolute path. Workflow reads ProjectVersion.txt and launches the matching Unity.exe under Unity Hub. Omit to skip Unity launch.
_fancyzones_layout_doc: Optional. Custom layout name from PowerToys FancyZones. Zones are read from %LOCALAPPDATA%/Microsoft/PowerToys/FancyZones/custom-layouts.json. If omitted, zones must be specified as explicit {x,y,w,h} rects.

windows._doc: Spawn a workflow agent terminal — kanban does the work, we just place its window.
Generic launch: any executable resolvable on PATH or absolute path.

_zone_doc: Each window's zone is one of: integer index into FancyZones layout, the string 'fullscreen', or an explicit {x,y,w,h} rect in pixels relative to the window's monitor.
_wait_doc: How long to wait for each launched window's title to appear before giving up and moving on.
